creator: asmodai@FreeBSD.org
text:
-On [20010609 22:50], Juergen Lock (nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de) wrote:
>On Sun, May 27, 2001 at 05:42:55PM +0200, Jimmy Olgeni wrote:
>> Do these fixes still apply? Or can this PR be closed?
>
>I don't think they apply to the current version...  asmodai,
>you said you sent the developers a patch, was it integrated?

I submitted parts and was working on fixing some more problems in the
source until my free/spare time got drained to a low level [which
changes when I get my new job settled].

I hope to restart that when I get my free time back again.
